tasks.label: Build SFML 3.0 Project
tasks.command: clang++ -std=c++17 -fcolor-diagnostics -fansi-escape-codes -g main.cpp src/utils/*.cpp src/exceptions/*.cpp src/core/*.cpp src/ui/*.cpp -o sfml-app -I/opt/homebrew/include -Isrc -L/opt/homebrew/lib -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -lsfml-audio -lsfml-network
